title: DnT Vault Keys x Bare Bones
description: Changes the textures of the vault keys to Bare Bones style.
body:
I have been using the mod [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns) for a while now, and the texture for the new vault keys they add was out of tune with the Bare Bones style I was using, so I decide to adapt by myself.

![All the Vault Keys](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/663357a5f3ac48b0f80eefc902c754ad4d7bed4c.png)

Big thank you to the creators of the mod to allowed me to realease it here. ❤

Contact me on my discord (seiyadipessego) if you have any problem with it.
